chunks.en: Today I want to talk about how I wash the dishes at home.
chunks.ja: 今日は家での皿洗いの仕方について話したいと思います。

chunks.en: I usually wash the dishes right after dinner, so they don't pile up.
chunks.ja: たいてい夕食のすぐ後に洗うので、皿がたまらないようにしています。

chunks.en: I use a soft sponge, some soap, and warm water to clean them.
chunks.ja: 柔らかいスポンジと洗剤とお湯を使って皿をきれいにします。

chunks.en: The dishes I hate most are the oily pans, because the fat is hard to remove.
chunks.ja: 一番洗いたくないのは油のついたフライパンです。油が落ちにくいからです。

chunks.en: I don't have a dishwasher, so I always wash everything by hand.
chunks.ja: 食洗機を持っていないので、いつも全部手で洗っています。

chunks.en: So washing the dishes is a small job, but it keeps my kitchen clean.
chunks.ja: だから皿洗いは小さな仕事ですが、キッチンをきれいに保ってくれます。

outline: Opening: how I wash the dishes at home
Point 1: when and how I do it
Point 2: worst dishes and hand washing

modelTalk.text: I usually wash the dishes right after I eat. I don't like to leave them in the sink. When dirty plates sit too long, the food gets hard. So I clean them fast. My way is simple. I use a soft sponge and some soap. I turn on the hot water and start washing. Hot water helps a lot with grease. I wash the glasses first, then the plates. The dishes I hate most are the oily ones. Frying pans are the worst for me. The oil sticks and it's hard to clean. Sometimes I need to scrub a pan for a long time. I don't have a dishwasher at home. So I wash everything by hand. It takes a few minutes, but that's okay. After I finish, I feel good. A clean kitchen makes me happy.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about how I wash the dishes at home.
chunks.ja: 今日は家での皿の洗い方についてお話ししたいです。

chunks.en: I usually wash the dishes right after dinner, so they don't pile up in the sink.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい夕食の後すぐに皿を洗うので、シンクに溜まりません。

chunks.en: The way I do it is simple: I use a sponge, some soap, and hot water.
chunks.ja: やり方はシンプルで、スポンジと洗剤とお湯を使います。

chunks.en: The dishes I hate washing most are greasy frying pans, because the oil is really hard to remove.
chunks.ja: 一番洗いたくない食器は油っぽいフライパンで、油がなかなか落ちないからです。

chunks.en: To wrap up, I wash by hand because I don't have a dishwasher yet.
chunks.ja: まとめると、まだ食洗機がないので私は手洗いしています。

outline: Opening: how I wash the dishes at home
Point 1: when I wash and my simple method
Point 2: greasy pans are the worst
Wrap-up: I wash by hand, no dishwasher

modelTalk.text: I don't wash the dishes right after I eat. I'm too tired then. So I leave them in the sink and do them later. Usually I wash everything at night, all at once. First, I turn on the hot water. Then I put some soap on my sponge. I scrub each plate slowly and rinse it well. Hot water makes the grease come off faster. The dishes I hate most are the oily ones. Frying pans are the worst for me. The oil sticks and it won't go away easily. Sometimes I let the pan soak first. That helps a little. I don't have a dishwasher at home. So I wash everything by hand. It takes time, but I kind of like it. It's quiet, and I can just think. That's my little routine every night.
